@graph.description: Tirzepatide is a dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist, FDA-approved as Mounjaro and Zepbound, showing the largest average weight-loss effect of any approved obesity drug to date (up to ~22.5% body weight at 72 weeks in SURMOUNT-1) and superior HbA1c reduction versus semaglutide in a head-to-head trial.
@graph.name: Tirzepatide
